title: Pennsylvania DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Authoritative — ST schedule + official job specs)
description: Narrative research notes for Pennsylvania DDS pay: administering agency (PA DLI Bureau of Disability Determination), the verified Disability Claims Adjudicator examiner series on the PA Standard Pay Schedule (Pay Scale Type ST) — Trainee (job code 45070, ST06), Adjudicator (45080, ST07), Supervisor (45140, ST08) — with the official job-code-to-pay-group mapping and the min/max annual salaries (75-hour and 80-hour bases) retrieved from the PA Commonwealth Careers job-spec and PayExp pages. SEIU Local 668 (units F4/F5) bargaining context. Companion to PA/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Commonwealth of Pennsylvania (Commonwealth Careers / Office of Administration); PA Dept of Labor & Industry (DLI) Bureau of Disability Determination
source.title: PA DDS salary research notes (ST pay schedule + Disability Claims Adjudicator job specs, retrieved 2026-06-02)

update_cadence: annual ST schedule revision / CBA cycle (SEIU 668)
notes: Authoritative: the Disability Claims Adjudicator series job codes (45070/45080/45140), their ST pay-scale-group assignments (ST06/ST07/ST08), and the min/max annual salaries were retrieved from the official PA Commonwealth Careers job-spec and PayExp pages on 2026-06-02. ST schedule effective 2025-07-01. Replaces prior agent-inferred SC-grade estimates (which were wrong on the classification system). SEIU Local 668 units F4 (adjudicators) / F5 (supervisor).
